name: RL Training Headers
description: Adds X-Session-Id and X-Turn-Type headers to every LLM API request for RL training data classification.

sessionIdHeader.label: Session ID Header Name
sessionIdHeader.help: HTTP header name for the session identifier (default: X-Session-Id).

turnTypeHeader.label: Turn Type Header Name
turnTypeHeader.help: HTTP header name for the turn type classifier (default: X-Turn-Type).
